{{Quote|I have a bad feeling about this!|Princess Kneesaa|<ref name="Ewoks 12">[[Ewoks (1985) 12|''Ewoks'' (1985) 12]]</ref>}}
The '''Thorn monster''' was a giant walking vegetable beast made by [[Morag]]. The creature was able to persecute the young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]]. But the couple headed toward the lake near the hot springs and jumped in for a swim, and when the beast followed them into the water, it began expanding so rapidly that it finally exploded, causing a rain fall over the forest.

{{Creature-stub}}
